feedback.text: In my view, this survey seems to me to be a very useful and necessary action, since we are a unique and unwavering generation, one of the first (not to say the first of all) generations that has been raised with an electronic device under the arm, in my case I remember Nintendo 3DS especially, but also with the influence of mobile phones, Ipads etc. This is why I think this survey is of great importance. since we have grown up with these utensils, we are best placed to assess the influence of the abusive (and usually not clearly visible) practices that are present in our daily lives and which we were particularly likely to count on these technologies from our very early stages. Student of the Jean Monnet Modules project “DERECHO”: ‘Defense of European Rights and Excellence for Consumers HHarmonisation’, No 101239437. Project financed by the European Union. Jean Monnet Actions in the field of Higher Education: Modules. Call for tenders ERASMUS-JMO-2025-HEI-TCH-RSCH.
